old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-bwkq","title":"Timer wraparound bug in route expiration","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/routing.c:654

The age calculation `uint32_t age = now - r->last_updated;` in `lichen_rpl_routing_table_expire()` does not handle timestamp wraparound.

Same issue as parent expiration: when the 32-bit millisecond counter wraps after ~49.7 days, routes may be incorrectly expired or retained.

Impact: Route table corruption after extended runtime.

Fix: Add wraparound-aware age calculation. Consider extracting a common helper function.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:51:18.382989Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:51:18.383023Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-bwkq","title":"Timer wraparound bug in route expiration","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/routing.c:654

The age calculation `uint32_t age = now - r->last_updated;` in `lichen_rpl_routing_table_expire()` does not handle timestamp wraparound.

Same issue as parent expiration: when the 32-bit millisecond counter wraps after ~49.7 days, routes may be incorrectly expired or retained.

Impact: Route table corruption after extended runtime.

Fix: Add wraparound-aware age calculation. Consider extracting a common helper function.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:51:18.382989Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:08.070874999Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:08.070874999Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:18:08.070874999Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:08.070874999Z"}

new_value: Route expiration now uses signed deadline method (routing.c:661) for wrap safety, matching dodag parents. No subtraction bug. Common helper noted for future. Json updated. Commit b8a9b5961
